TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Don_Betourne, title = Don_Betourne, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Don_Betourne} }

S.FORM: Don Betourne kawas tay 1915, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 2, Don Betourne, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2002) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
Don Betourne kawas tay 1915, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 2, Don Betourne, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2002) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *on βetourne kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *on βetourne, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
